deploy.startCommand: sed -i 's/translateY(-100px);/translateY(-100px);opacity:0;/' public/index.html && sed -i 's/#toast.show {/#toast.show {opacity:1;/' public/index.html && sed -i 's|/ida-logo.png|Modern%20Indian%20Drivers%20Association%20logo.png|g' public/index.html && sed -i 's|class=\"header-logo\">||' public/index.html && sed -i 's/if (SUREPASS_API_TOKEN) {/if (SUREPASS_API_TOKEN || process.env.RAPIDAPI_KEY) {/g' server.js && sed -i 's|function surepassCall(endpoint, body) {|function surepassCall(endpoint, body) { if (process.env.RAPIDAPI_KEY) { const rkc = require(\"./rapidapi-kyc\"); return rkc.surepassCompatCall(endpoint, body); }|' server.js && sed -i 's|server.listen|try { require(\"./firebase-auth-routes\")(app, admin, MemStore); } catch(e) { console.log(\"[Auth] Routes load error:\", e.message); } server.listen|' server.js && node server.js
